<USER_REQUEST>
You are improving the UI/UX of the SMSentry Android app to production-grade quality. The app uses Jetpack Compose with Material3.

Working directory: D:\SMSentry

DO NOT modify these files (other agents are editing them):
- DeepCheckSession.kt
- LiteRtLmEngine.kt
- DeepCheckConfig.kt
- PromptTemplates.kt
- OfficialSitesRepository.kt
- SmsRepository.kt
- InboxViewModel.kt (logic only — you CAN edit UI)

## Tasks:

### 1. Theme & Colors (app/src/main/java/com/smssentry/ui/theme/)
Read Color.kt, Theme.kt, Type.kt. Ensure:
- A professional dark/light theme with purple/indigo brand colors (matching the app icon: deep navy + purple shield)
- Proper Material3 color roles (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, surface, etc.)
- Typography using a modern Google Font (Inter or Roboto)
- Smooth theme transitions

### 2. InboxScreen (app/src/main/java/com/smssentry/ui/inbox/InboxScreen.kt)
- Add a proper top app bar with the app name and a settings icon
- Add pull-to-refresh
- Add a search bar for filtering SMS messages
- Add smooth item animations (AnimatedVisibility for list items)
- Show risk level badges on each SMS card (color-coded: green=safe, yellow=suspicious, red=scam)
- Empty state with an illustration message
- Loading skeleton/shimmer effect while loading

### 3. DetailScreen (app/src/main/java/com/smssentry/ui/detail/DetailScreen.kt)
- Improve the layout with proper card sections
- Add a pulsing animation while Deep Check is running
- Show a progress timeline for the analysis steps
- Make the verdict display prominent with color-coded backgrounds
- Add share button for the verdict
- Add smooth transitions between states (loading → analyzing → verdict)

### 4. VerdictCard & Evidence components
Read all files in app/src/main/java/com/smssentry/ui/components/
Improve:
- VerdictCard: large, prominent, color-coded (green/yellow/red)
- EvidenceCard: clean list items with severity icons
- Add micro-animations (card entrance, icon pulse)
- RiskScoreBar: animated progress bar

### 5. Navigation
Read NavGraph.kt. Ensure smooth transitions between screens.

After ALL changes, verify build compiles:
